title: Find My Friends
description: Allows you to see player name tags across any distance
body:
Ever get tired of losing your friends when you go exploring? This simple mod renders their name plate over any distance so you always know how to find your way back, even when they're outside your render distance. 

- Keybind to hide names of far away players. Defaults to m
- Distance between you and each player is shown above their name plate
- By default, sneaking players will be hidden. There is a config for this
- This mod must be installed on both the server and the client. It will never be client side only. 
 

### Credits 

- The 1.16.5 and 1.18.2 versions were commissioned by raffle
